headline: Sensient Technologies (SXT) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
summary: Sensient (SXT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +30.00% and +7.38%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
